title: Surgeon Vacancy at Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital!
